positive: Stylized geometric illustration of a whimsical forest landscape viewed through a stylized archway. The main subject is a cluster of oversized, friendly woodland creatures (foxes, deer, rabbits) depicted in clean, simplified silhouettes. The color palette uses deep jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted with stark white and gold accents. The composition should be centrally balanced and vertically oriented, suitable for a repeating pattern or single large print on apparel. Details include stylized flora, moon phase elements, and minimal celestial body outlines. Studio lighting, ultra-high contrast, flat graphic design aesthetic, vector art, suitable for screen printing, 2D illustration.
